title: Options Income Series - Earn Double-Digit Income (January 2023)
text: We explain why selling cash-covered puts and covered calls are relatively safe choices for earning a high income. We will discuss how to formulate an options income strategy that's sustainable and repeatable.

title: The 7 Best Growth Stocks to Buy to Retire Early
text: While there's always a time and place to play it safe, investors at some point will likely need to consider the best growth stocks to buy to retire early. As the most recent World Cup demonstrated, some teams can successfully deploy defensive counterattacking strategies to win.

title: Lam Research Continues ESG Momentum with Inclusion on the 2022 Dow Jones Sustainability Index for North America
text: Lam also extends focus on global impact by joining the United Nations Global Compact FREMONT, Calif. , Dec. 12, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Lam Research Corp. (NASDAQ: LRCX) today announced it has been recognized for its environmental, social and governance (ESG) performance with its inclusion on the Dow Jones Sustainability Index for North America (DJSI North America) for a second consecutive year.

title: Lam Research (LCRX): Playing Bullish Trends Via a Short Put Spread
